about: I build things at the intersection of code, data, and design. Currently focused on crafting tools that make the web more useful — one line at a time.

projects.title: my-api
projects.description: A personal API server with daily brief aggregation, user management, and a brutalist blog frontend.

projects.title: Data Pipeline Toolkit
projects.description: A collection of lightweight ETL scripts for ingesting, cleaning, and routing data between services.

projects.title: CLI Workspace Manager
projects.description: Terminal-based productivity tool for managing projects, notes, and task lists with fuzzy search.
